series_metadata.series_description: This series contains originals/copies of incoming and outgoing general correspondence for the Network Services Administration section. Electronic documents are maintained in various formats (Word, Access, Excel, Text, Powerpoint, PDF).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in operating system for 2 years, then erase. ; Paper: Retain in office area for 2 years, then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Trash
